text.title: ba-planning Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ba-planning as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Listing plausible-sounding stakeholder roles without confirming they exist in the org chart.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs invent plausible stakeholders ("Director of UX," "VP of Platform"); gap to reality causes missed sign-offs and broken escalation paths at critical decision points.

failure-mode.description: Omitting T5 on the first cycle because "we don't have baselines yet."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without T5, there is no instrumentation; the second cycle cannot improve because it has nothing to improve from. Baselines are collected during the first cycle, not before it.

failure-mode.description: LLM merges the five BABOK KA1 tasks into a single "BA Plan" document and silently drops T4 and T5.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Information management and performance improvement are the least visible KA1 tasks; LLMs drop them because they appear in fewer training examples. Validate output against the five-task schema; reject if any task is missing.

failure-mode.description: LLM produces vague governance approvers ("leadership," "the product team") in T3.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Vague approvers cannot sign off on anything; escalation paths point to a role, not a person. Require an email or @-handle; reject role-only outputs.

failure-mode.description: LLM rewrites full artifact content during monitoring instead of emitting CR patches.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Full-doc overwrites destroy the approver's ability to review changes incrementally; CR patches force explicit diff review. Cap monitor agent at 5 changes per artifact per run.
